address.address1: 99, Jalan Teuku Muhammad Hasan No 99, Sukadamai, Lueng Bata, Banda Aceh, Aceh, Sumatera, 23123, Indonesia, Banda Aceh

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

reviews.hotelName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewComments: The location is very strategic, across from there is Kutaradja fried chicken and an Alfamart that is open 24 hours.
comments.originalComment: Lokasinya sangat strategis, di seberang ada Kutaradja fried chicken dan alfamart yg buka 24 jam

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewComments: Strategic location close to various places and affordable prices suitable for tourists in Aceh looking for an overnight stay.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi strategis dekat untuk kemana  aja dan harga murah cocok utk wisatawan yg ke aceh utk istirahat malam

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewPositives: Pelayanan nya ramah, teman nyaman, dekat dengan kota

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewComments: It's pretty good for that price, although there are a few facilities that are lacking, but it's not a problem 👍😎💪
comments.originalComment: Lumayan dengan haarga segitu,cuma ada beberapa fasilitas yang kurang lengkap,,tapi tidak jadi masalah 👍😎💪

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewComments: First, there was no water at all; I intentionally checked in early so I could shower. In fact, there was no water at all, so I booked another hotel. The next day, I went back there. Well, the toilet could have been bought a little cleaner.
comments.originalComment: Pertama datang air tidak ada sama sekali,sengaja ambil check in awak biar bisa mandi . Malah air gak ada sama sekali , terakhir pesan hotel lain . Besok nya baru balik kesitu . Nah , toiletnya bisa kali dibeli pembersih sedikit

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewComments: No wifi, no towels provided, no toothbrush or soap. The reason is that they have run out, no mineral water provided. The shower water pressure is weak, the bathroom drain is clogged.
comments.originalComment: Wifi tidak ada, handuk tidak dikasih, sikat gigi sabun tidak ada. Alasannya sudah habis, mineral tdk dikasih. Air showernya kecil, saluran kamar mandi mampet

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O near Terminal Batoh formerly Hotel Al Fatih
comments.reviewComments: We were moved to another hotel, they said all the rooms were full, even though we had booked and there were still rooms available. When we got there, the rooms were full, so we were moved to another hotel which is on the 3rd floor, the air conditioning is not very cold, and the bathroom door is broken. Ah, definitely not recommended.
comments.originalComment: Masa dipindahkan ke hotel lain , katanya semua kamarnya penuh , padahal kita pesan masih ada kamarnya sampai sana kamar penuh, dipindahkan ke hotel lain yg mana lantainya lantai 3 , ac kureng dingin, pintu kamar mandi rusak , ah no rekomendasi lah
